case_title: BRYSON, RODOLFO T. JR. vs. BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CO DBA CALIF.MEAT COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYSON, RODOLFO T. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CO DBA CALIF.MEAT COMPANY
